stemHtml:
On a Lambert conformal conical chart projection, two waypoints A and B are connected by a straight line. Given the following information, calculate the latitude of the parallel of origin:

A: 59°52'N 001°17'W
B: 58°52'N 005°38'E
Initial track point A to B: 109°(M), variation 007°W
Initial track point B to A: 291°(M), variation 003°W
